page: Microsoft Azure M128s_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv2 family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features an Intel processor. The instance provides 128 dedicated vCPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type is configured with 2048.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach external high-performance persistent disks. There are no bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high resource density, specifically the 2 TB RAM allocation, the M128s_v2 represents a high-end hardware class designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It is qualitatively positioned for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data warehousing, and large-scale data processing tasks that require massive memory footprints without local storage requirements.
description: Microsoft Azure M128s_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv2 family, powered by an Intel x86_64 processor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs and 2048.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per vCPU. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable for attaching external persistent volumes. It contains no integrated GPUs and provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for high-density memory workloads, this server type is suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and intensive data processing tasks requiring massive memory capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128s_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 2048 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for large-scale enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M128s_v2 is a memory-optimized VM with 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 2048 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring one hundred twenty-eight dedicated cores and two terabytes of system memory.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
2048.0 GB of system memory (16.0 GB per vCPU)
Premium Storage capable with no local storage
Suited for large in-memory databases and ERP systems
